name: plc-sequence-analysis
description: Analyze PLC sequence logic, interlocks, alarms, mode transitions, timers, counters, and recovery behavior.

# PLC Sequence Analysis

1. Enumerate modes, states, transitions, and abnormal branches.
2. List permissives, inhibits, alarms, and reset conditions.
3. Derive positive, negative, and recovery test cases.
